name: aiops-stdout-logging
title: AIOps services emit stdout lifecycle logs
creator: AIops
notes: Cluster AC verified 2026-06-26: kubectl logs deploy/aiops-gateway shows per-request stdout access lines (/healthz /connectors /readyz /metrics); Loki query_range {namespace="aiops-dev"} returns real AIOps pod streams (mcp-topology/mcp-prometheus/hermes/gateway) not only smoke pod.
